_comment: base_command: paste the full sglang launch command as a single JSON string. Backslash-newline shell continuations are supported. --speculative-* and --port are stripped automatically and re-injected per sweep.
_seqlen_note: CRITICAL: use YOUR actual production input token lengths. The itl_cost trend direction (increasing vs decreasing with batch_size) depends on seqlen, because FlashAttention KV-sharing efficiency changes with sequence length.
_spec_note: speculative_algorithm must match SGLang's SpeculativeAlgorithm enum (case-insensitive): EAGLE | EAGLE3 | DFLASH | STANDALONE | NGRAM. speculative_draft_model_path: leave empty for MTP/SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 (main model reused); set to draft checkpoint path for EAGLE3 / DFLASH / STANDALONE / classic EAGLE1.
_tokenizer_note: Leave empty to auto-use --model-path from base_command. JSONL writes input_tokens from this tokenizer (chat template included).
